3.10.1.manual_guidance: Review physical access control mechanisms (badge readers, biometrics, cipher locks, key management). Verify authorized access lists are current and reviewed quarterly. Confirm physical access logs are maintained and that access is limited to authorized individuals for areas containing CUI systems. Note: For cloud environments, physical security is the CSP's responsibility under shared responsibility model; verify CSP compliance via FedRAMP authorization.
evidence_requests: Authorized access list for CUI areas

objectives_requiring_documentation.text: authorized individuals allowed physical access are identified.
objectives_requiring_documentation.evidence_needed: Provide documentation showing that authorized individuals allowed physical access are identified and documented.

objectives_requiring_documentation.text: physical access to organizational systems is limited to authorized individuals.
objectives_requiring_documentation.evidence_needed: Provide physical security evidence: physical access to organizational systems is limited to authorized individuals.

objectives_requiring_documentation.text: physical access to equipment is limited to authorized individuals.
objectives_requiring_documentation.evidence_needed: Provide physical security evidence: physical access to equipment is limited to authorized individuals.

objectives_requiring_documentation.text: physical access to operating environments is limited to authorized individuals.
objectives_requiring_documentation.evidence_needed: Provide physical security evidence: physical access to operating environments is limited to authorized individuals.

3.10.2.manual_guidance: Review physical security monitoring systems including surveillance cameras, intrusion detection alarms, and environmental controls (HVAC, fire suppression, water detection). Verify monitoring coverage of server rooms, network closets, and other areas with CUI systems. For cloud, verify CSP provides appropriate physical monitoring via FedRAMP.

objectives_requiring_documentation.text: the physical facility where that system resides is protected.
objectives_requiring_documentation.evidence_needed: Provide physical security evidence: the physical facility where that system resides is protected.

objectives_requiring_documentation.text: the support infrastructure for that system is protected.
objectives_requiring_documentation.evidence_needed: Provide documentation or process evidence: the support infrastructure for that system is protected.

objectives_requiring_documentation.text: the physical facility where that system resides is monitored.
objectives_requiring_documentation.evidence_needed: Provide physical security evidence: the physical facility where that system resides is monitored.

objectives_requiring_documentation.text: the support infrastructure for that system is monitored.
objectives_requiring_documentation.evidence_needed: Provide documentation or process evidence: the support infrastructure for that system is monitored.

3.10.3.manual_guidance: Review visitor management procedures. Verify visitor sign-in/sign-out logs, identification verification, badge issuance, and escort requirements. Confirm visitors are escorted at all times in areas where CUI is accessible. Check that visitor access areas are clearly delineated.
evidence_requests: Visitor badge issuance and tracking records

objectives_requiring_documentation.evidence_needed: Provide documentation or process evidence: visitors are escorted.
Provide documentation or process evidence: visitor activity is monitored.

3.10.4.manual_guidance: Review physical access audit logs and retention periods. Verify logs capture entry and exit times, individual identity, and access point. Confirm logs are retained per organizational policy (minimum 12 months recommended). Check for automated alerting on anomalous access patterns.

objectives_requiring_documentation.text: audit logs of physical access are maintained.
objectives_requiring_documentation.evidence_needed: Provide physical security evidence: audit logs of physical access are maintained.

3.10.5.manual_guidance: Review inventory and management of physical access devices (keys, badges, smart cards, combinations, PINs). Verify devices are inventoried regularly, changed when compromised or when personnel are terminated, and that lost/stolen devices trigger immediate reissuance and audit.
evidence_requests: Device deactivation records for terminated personnel

objectives_requiring_documentation.evidence_needed: Provide documentation showing that physical access devices are identified and documented.
Provide physical security evidence: physical access devices are controlled.
Provide physical security evidence: physical access devices are managed.

3.10.6.manual_guidance: Review telework and alternate work site policies for personnel handling CUI. Verify requirements for physical security at home offices (locked room/cabinet for CUI materials), network security (VPN, encrypted Wi-Fi), and clean desk requirements. Confirm regular assessments of alternate work site security.
evidence_requests: Telework and remote work security policy
Alternate work site security assessment form
Employee telework agreements with security provisions

objectives_requiring_documentation.text: safeguarding measures for CUI are defined for alternate work sites.
objectives_requiring_documentation.evidence_needed: Provide documentation showing that safeguarding measures for cui are defined.

objectives_requiring_documentation.text: safeguarding measures for CUI are enforced for alternate work sites.
objectives_requiring_documentation.evidence_needed: Provide documentation or process evidence: safeguarding measures for CUI are enforced for alternate work sites.
